themes.label: AI compute infrastructure
themes.description: Compute, accelerator, and data-center infrastructure names that may warrant intake research for AI-capacity buildout exposure.
evidence_requirements: official segment revenue or order evidence
capex or customer-demand evidence from official filings
thesis-breaker evidence for margin, supply, or customer concentration

themes.label: AI server supply chain
themes.description: Server, systems, networking, and integration names that may sit in the AI infrastructure supply chain.
evidence_requirements: official backlog or order evidence
customer concentration and margin evidence
supply-chain capacity and execution-risk evidence

themes.label: Memory and storage supercycle
themes.description: Memory, storage, and related cyclicals that may benefit from structural demand or supply discipline.
evidence_requirements: official memory or storage cycle evidence
supply discipline and pricing evidence
cycle-breaker evidence for oversupply, capex, or margin pressure

themes.label: Semiconductor capital equipment
themes.description: Semiconductor equipment and process-control names that may benefit from AI, memory, logic, or reshoring capex.
evidence_requirements: official order, backlog, or WFE demand evidence
customer capex and cycle evidence
export-control, concentration, and cancellation-risk evidence

themes.label: Power, cooling, and grid bottlenecks
themes.description: Electricity, cooling, grid, and infrastructure names tied to data-center and industrial power constraints.
evidence_requirements: official demand, contract, or utility-load evidence
capacity and permitting evidence
commodity, regulation, and execution-risk evidence

themes.label: Critical minerals and lithium
themes.description: Lithium and critical-mineral names that may sit in battery, storage, and electrification supply chains.
evidence_requirements: official production, price, and volume evidence
cost-curve and balance-sheet evidence
oversupply, substitution, and demand-risk evidence

themes.label: Reshoring and foundry
themes.description: Foundry, manufacturing, and national-capacity names that may connect to reshoring, supply security, or AI PC cycles.
evidence_requirements: official capex, subsidy, or foundry-customer evidence
yield and utilization evidence
turnaround, execution, and balance-sheet breaker evidence

themes.label: Defense industrial
themes.description: Defense, aerospace, and industrial-base names that may warrant intake under supply-chain rebuilding themes.
evidence_requirements: official backlog, bookings, or program evidence
budget and procurement evidence
execution, margin, and program-cancellation breaker evidence

themes.label: Biotech platform
themes.description: Biotech platform names that may warrant intake where evidence supports durable platform leverage rather than single-event speculation.
evidence_requirements: official clinical, regulatory, or partnership evidence
platform-repeatability evidence
cash runway, dilution, and trial-failure breaker evidence
